raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need to keep last 5 fields. Use awk -F, '{print $(NF-4),$(NF-3),$(NF-2),$(NF-1),$NF}' OFS=, file. But need to output to same file? Probably overwrite. Use sponge. Command: awk -F, 'BEGIN{OFS=","} {print $(NF-4),$(NF-3),$(NF-2),$(NF-1),$NF}' /system/folder1/data.csv | sponge /system/folder1/data.csv. Provide single command.
